== Notes for [[Item:Q107163|Q107163]] ==

* From Hudood-e-Kiraam of ???
* Wllaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source 1: http://www.ismaili.net/histoire/history04/history410.html

Source 2: http://www.ismaili.net/histoire/history04/history411.html

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000015280265343

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
